rulings.Case Title: TIMOTHY CURTIN et al VS. BANK OF AMERICA, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Compel Further Responses To Request For Production Of Documents, Set One, And Request For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Matter on calendar for Monday November 29,2010, Line 1. DEFENDANT UNIVERSAL AMERICAN MORTGAGE COMPANY's Motion To Compel Further Responses To Request For Production Of Documents, Set One, And Request For Sanctions. Granted in its entirety. Plaintiffs to provide verified responses without objection and pay $1,000.00 sanctions to defendant with 15 days of service of this order. = (302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: CACH, LLC VS. IAN D PHELPS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice And Motion For Order Compelling Response To Pltf'S Request For Production Of Documents And First Set Of Interrogatories; Order Deeming Admissions Admitted And For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Matter on calendar for Monday November 29,2010, Line 2. PLAINTIFF CACH, LLC's Motion For Order Compelling Response To Plaintiff'S Request For Production Of Documents And First Set Of Interrogatories; Order Deeming Admissions Admitted And For Sanctions. GRANTED, No opposition filed. Defendant to pay sanctions to plaintiff in the amount of $340.00. = (302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: HOUSEHOLD FINANCE CORPORATION OF CALIFORNIA VS. RAQUEL R. DEWITT et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Monday, November 29, 2010, line 3 PLAINTIFF HOUSEHOLD FINANCE CORPORATION OF CALIFORNIA'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. ORIGINAL FILED MOTION IS UNSIGNED, AND INDICATES THE AMOUNT OWED IS $14,058.02 DUE TO CREDIT OFFSET. DECLARATION OF RECOVERY SPECIALIST STARKS, DATED MARCH 31, 2010, STATES AMOUNT OWED IS $14,600.02. FAILURE TO SHIFT THE BURDEN OF PROOF REGARDING AMOUNT PRESENTLY OWED. =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: POTRERO MEDIA CORPORATION, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATIO VS. MATTHEW JONES et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Quash Subpoena
rulings.Rulings: Matter on calendar for Monday November 29,2010, Line 3. DEFENDANT MATTHEW JONES's Motion To Quash Subpoena. Hearing continued to December 9,2010. Defendant to immediately re-serve moving papers. Plaintiff to file substantive opposition by December 3,2010. Defendant to file reply, if any, by December 7,2010. Courtesy copies of all filings to Department 302 with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date. = (302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: POTRERO MEDIA CORPORATION, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATIO VS. MATTHEW JONES et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Monday, November 29, 2010, line 4 DEFENDANT MATTHEW JONES' MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND IS GRANTED. DEFENDANT SHOWS REASONABLE MISTAKE AND THE LAW FAVORS ADJUDICATION ON THE MERITS. =(302/CWW)

rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion To Compel Underinsured Motorist Arbitration
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Monday, November 29, 2010, line 6 PETITIONER JORDAN ST. rulings.Case Title: SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY VS. MARIA SHAW et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Monday, November 29, 2010, line 8 PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. ABSENT OPPOSITION, MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF SHIFTS THE BURDEN OF PROOF AND NO TRIABLE ISSUE OF MATERIAL FACT IS RAISED. PALINTIFF MUST PREPARE AND SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER THAT APPLIES TO THIS CASE AND THAT MIRRORS ITS SEPARATE STATEMENT. =(302/CWW)
